subject: [PATCH v7 18/20] nfsd: properly track requested child attributes

2026-06-16.patch_summary: This patch improves how the NFS server handles child attributes in directory delegations. It correctly tracks the union of requested and supported child attributes, ensuring that only the necessary attributes are encoded when sending add/remove/rename updates. The patch also adjusts the budget for encoding child attribute bitmaps to account for the increased size of the bitmap when word1 attributes are included.
